推荐场景: 会议室｜协调人力/时间/预算
60秒任务: 「资源协调」：背景/优先级/风险/行动项；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 优先级｜风险｜资源｜时间线｜行动项｜责任分配
场景族: 办公室｜会议室｜远程会议｜走廊对话｜协作工具界面
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
Do we have enough people for ___?（确认人力）
We may need support from ___.（请求支持）
Can we borrow someone from another team?（跨团队协调）
The budget doesn’t cover that yet.（预算限制）
Which resource is the bottleneck?（识别瓶颈）
I can help, but only for ___.（限定支持）
Let’s match the workload to the team’s capacity.（匹配工作量）
Who owns this part?（确认负责人）
We need clearer handoffs.（优化交接）
Can we share the materials in one place?（集中资料）
This requires more time than expected.（时间资源）
Let’s check availability before we commit.（承诺前确认）
If capacity is tight, we should reduce scope.（缩范围）
Can we reassign ___ to ___?（重新分配）
I’ll coordinate with ___ after the meeting.（会后协调）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: resource, capacity, budget, workload, owner, handoff, material, support
Verbs: coordinate, reassign, borrow, commit, cover, share, check, reduce
Adjectives / Status: tight, available, overloaded, underused, unclear, shared
Time / Place: after the meeting, this week, on the shared drive, in the team chat
Chunks: team capacity, reduce scope, clear handoff, enough people, check availability
